title: Terraria Items
description: This project adds some items and weapons from Terraria and the Terraria Calamity Mod into Minecraft.
body:
# Terraria Items

Adds in items, tools, weapons, and accessories from Terraria and the Terraria Calamity Mod. Perfect for smaller survival servers/groups of friends.

## Important: 
When first joining a server with this plugin, players will be prompted to download the plugin's resource pack. Without the resource pack, all items will be untextured.
The resource pack can be independently downloaded [here](https://github.com/CarsonWebb/Terraria_Items/releases/download/Textures/TerrariaTextures.zip).

## About:

This plugin adds in many different items and features from both Terraria and the Terraria Calamity mod. It adds weapons, accessories, tools, armors, materials, new crafting recipes, mob drops,and a crafting station. It also replicates Terraria's Mana system for magic weapons.

---

![Some of the items that have been added in.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I5PNUeKt/images/beee9454b580178e229944285f56db5ceb913fa9.png)

---

**In total this plugin adds in:**
- Hardmode
- 71 Weapons
- 21 Tools
- 4 Potions
- 16 Materials
- 1 Crafting Station/Block
- 10 Sets of Armor
- 17 Enemies
- 63 Accessories
- 8 Fishing Crates
- Vanity System
- 3 Bosses
- Rogue weapons and mechanics from Calamity

---

### Hardmode:

A world enters hardmode after the Ender Dragon has been defeated. If it has already been defeated then killing it again will also enter it into Hardmode.

---

### Vanity System:

For older versions 2.1 and before, for the Vanity system to work [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) MUST be installed. This is not necessary for the plugin to function and only to use the vanity function.

This feature is still a WIP

---

### Commands:

| Command | Usage | Permissions |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
|/ti give [ItemName]| Gives item | Op |
|/ti toggle_prehardmode | Toggles Pre-Hardmode features|Op |
|/ti toggle_hardmode | Toggles Hardmode features |Op |
|/ti toggle_blood_moon | Toggles if Blood Moons can occur |Op |
|/ti summon_blood_moon | Summons a Blood Moon |Op |
|/ti toggle_message |Toggles Welcome Message| Default |
|/ti accessory|Opens Accessory Inventory|Default |
|/ti vanity| Opens Vanity Inventory |Default |
|/ti reset_bonuses |Reset Armor/Accessory Bonuses |Default |
|/ti undiscover |Undicover Custom Recipes |Default |

---

### Languages:

Terraria Items currently supports English, Spanish, Russian, and Chinese(Simplified). In Order to change the language, in the server files go to plugins/TerrariaItems/config.yml to change the language.

- en_US - English
- es_MX - Spanish
- ru_RU - Russian
- zh_CN - Chinese(Simplified)

NOTE: Items in different languages and from previous versions can NOT be crafted together

---

### Important Links:

- [Wiki](https://github.com/Lionstar22/Terraria_Items/wiki)
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/P8DHZnJ6dx)
- [Report an Issue](https://github.com/Lionstar22/Terraria_Items/issues)
- [Source Code](https://github.com/Lionstar22/Terraria_Items)

---

Some sprites used in this project are from Terraria and the Terraria Calamity Mod by Re-Logic and the Terraria Calamity Mod Dev Team. All rights to the original artwork belong to the respective owners.

---
